blocks.content: Congratulations on completing this journey! Job well done!

We hope you've enjoyed traveling with us as you:

- Navigated to Traces Drilldown and viewed the distribution of trace span durations
- Identified and reviewed the details of the slowest traces
- Viewed the details of a trace span to identify the root cause of latency

---

### More to explore (optional)

The world is your oyster! Read more about how you can:

- [Investigate trends and spikes](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/visualizations/simplified-exploration/traces/investigate/)
- [Identify bottlenecks and establish SLOs](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/visualizations/simplified-exploration/traces/concepts/solutions-with-traces/traces-app-insights/)
- [Diagnose errors with traces](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/visualizations/simplified-exploration/traces/concepts/solutions-with-traces/traces-diagnose-errors/)
- [Traces in Explore](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana-cloud/visualizations/explore/trace-integration/)

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this journey:

- [Visualize traces in a Grafana Cloud dashboard](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/visualization-traces/)
- [Explore data using Metrics Drilldown](https://grafana.com/docs/learning-paths/drilldown-metrics/)
